subject: Add additional null checks when building pserver objects from openstack server object. This error is not reproduceable with mitaka and queens release of openstack
commit_message:
Add additional null checks when building pserver objects from
openstack server object. This error is not reproduceable with
mitaka and queens release of openstack

    Issue-ID: SO-2802

Signed-off-by: Munir Ahmad <munir.ahmad@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I8c7a31d98ba4ef05faaf07ded0da13120fddf2c7
